sample_values: We have a quiet and sunny room with a good view in our 3 bedroom flat. In a welcoming atmosphere, our clean and respectful flatshare is located in a leafy neighbourhood with all facilities: shops, library, cafés and bars, a swimming pools, gyms, and fantastic parks. Well connected by metro and bus with the centre: 15 minutes. For walks, we are also a 20 min stroll away from the riverside.

Beautiful Loft 60m2 size just in the historical center of Madrid (Lavapiés/Tirso de Molina)  with 3 balconies, wood floor, Two columns and a library separate the sitting to the bedroom. New & bright bathroom and kitchen

INCREDIBLE HOME OF AN ARTIST SURROUNDED BY PAINTINGS AND ARTWORK. AMPLE AND BRIGHT APARTMENT OF 120 M2 WITH A SPACIOUS, OPEN KITCHEN. PERFECT TO COOK AT HOME AND ENJOY DINNER. FEEL HOME AT THIS WELL AND PLEASANT FLAT WITH A SPECIAL DECORATED LIVING ROOM. AVAILABLE DURING THE WHOLE GAYPRIDE  ENJOY MADRID´S TRENDIEST DISTRICT WITHIN A COZY ATMOSPHERE IN THE CENTER OF MADRID BETWEEN GRAN VIA AND CHUECA. FULL OF ART MUSEUMS, PRADO MUSEUM, rEINA SOFIA AND THYSSEN ART MUSEUM, CLOSE TO MY APARTMENT

We live in a leafy neighbourhood with plenty of green areas and recreational opportunities such as the library, gyms, swimming pools (covered and summer ones), and the tennis courts. Parking is free outside and it is relatively easy to park near the flat.

DISTRICT WITH VERY GOOD VIBES IN THE MIDDLE OF MADRID, BESIDE GRAN VÍA AND ALCALÁ (METRO BANCO DE ESPAÑA (METRO LINE 2)
VERY GOOD LOCATION AT CHUECA DISTRICT FULL OF RESTAURANTS, MUSEUMS, CINEMAS, DISCOS AND BARS.

The location of this apartment is ideal for walking around Madrid's most significant tourist and historical landmarks. Beautiful squares such as Plaza de España, Plaza del Callao, Ópera, Plaza Mayor, Puerta del Sol,... Stunning streets are only 1 minute away as Calle de la Gran Vía y calle de la Princesa, full of cinemas, theatres and restaurants. Or Calle Preciados with a multitude of prestigious shops, bars with terraces and lots of entertainment. Visiting major Museums such as El Prado, Thyssen and Reina Sofía or the Royal Palace. Another option is to take a bus that takes sightseeing tours around the city. Only 200 m. begins the Plaza de España, which in turn is the entrance to the main green area of Madrid. To its left are the 2 gardens of the Royal Palace: "Sabatini" and "Campo del Moro", and on the right you will find the "Temple of Debod" and the "Parque del Oeste", where you can take the cable car from which you can see Madrid from above crossing the "Casa de Campo".

EN-ES-FR
EN
Hi everybody: I'm Abdel. I'm spanish originaly from Casablanca (Morocco). I've been living for many years in Andlusian area and now in Madrid that I like very much, since 11 years. My job is related with languages and communication. I'm a quiet person. I don't smoke, and I do some sport. I like nature, painting and photography.
Please, do ask me any thing you consider useful for you. 
Kind regards.
 -----
ES
Hola chicos y chicas: soy Abdel. Soy español original de Casablanca, Marruecos. He vivido muchos años en Andalucía y ahora llevo casi 11 años en Madrid, que me encanta. Mi trabajo está relacionado con las lenguas y la comunicación. Soy una persona tranquila y algo reflexiva. No fumo, hago algo de deportes, y me gusta además de la naturaleza, la puntura y la fotografía.
En caso de necesidad, no duden en plantearme cualquier pregunta que consideran oportuna. 
Un cordial saludo.

FR
Bonjour, tout le monde,
Je suis Abdel, espagnol d'origine marocaine (de Casablanca). J'ai vécu pendant plusieurs années en Andalousie, mais maintenant je suis installé à Madrid depuis 11 ans. Je suis une personne cool et un peu pensatif. Je ne fume pas et je pratique un peu de sport. D'autre part, je suis un amoureux de la nature, la peinture et la photographie. S'il vous plait, n'hesitez pas de me poser des questions, si vous en avez besoin ...
Cordialement,

Apartasol offers a network of several spacious, comfortable apartments in the vibrant heart of Madrid.  The apartments are situated in three different locations, all very central and within walking distance from each other.  The sizes range from 35m 2 studios to 75m 2 two bedroom apartments and they can accommodate from 1 person up to 6 people depending on the type and size of the apartment.  Recently refurbished, the apartments are sure to preserve the traditional Madrileño look. Apartasol is well known for its extremely friendly staff and impeccable cleaning services

Estoy empezando en Airbnb y deseo que mis huéspedes estén contentos. Me gusta mi ciudad Madrid. Y puedo recomendar lugares para disfrutar de su casco histórico, y de sus actividades culturales y sociales. Soy además poeta y puedo recomendaros bares y salas de actuaciones de monólogos, teatro y poesía

["First aid kit", "Hair dryer", "Bed linens", "Cooking basics", "Shampoo", "Wifi", "Dishes and silverware", "Microwave", "Hot water", "Hangers", "Extra pillows and blankets", "Coffee maker", "Air conditioning", "Free parking on premises", "Kitchen", "Essentials", "TV", "Refrigerator", "Heating", "Iron", "Pocket wifi", "Elevator", "Fire extinguisher", "Oven", "Lock on bedroom door", "Washer"]

Juan Pedro was a nice host. JP provided detailed tips on what to see around Madrid, with how to get there. It indeed helps a great deal with jump-in traveler like me.
Room (and flat) was tidied up by him. Nice place.
I will come back when in Madrid.
Thanks Juan Pedro

Very clean and neat appartment. I would recommend anyone to stay at Juanpe's.
Very good communication and a lot of useful tips about the city (museums,restaurants,parking etc...).We liked these little attentions like some fresh fruits and water,which are pretty likeable when you'd been through airports and train stations all day long!
It says many on the great host he is.

Juanpe is open, honest and absolutely reliable guy. He really took care about us, even gave us a discount for a minor inconvinience because of the works at the facade of the buiding that took the place that time. It was a really good time we spent in his lovely apartment. The location is very good, you can easily get to all main museums and to the airport by subway.The apatment is very comfortable to live in, has everything you need and even more. Highly recomended!
